service.description:
Run a 6-DOF robot trajectory planner using a DJL ONNX MLP model.
The model accepts [q_start(6) || q_goal(6)] (12 inputs) and produces N_WAYPOINTS × 6 joint angles (flat output).
Persists results to: Vector / VectorComponent — per-waypoint joint positions + q_start/q_goal ApproximatedFunction — parent function container ParametricPath — path-level metadata Trajectory — time-tagged motion ApproximatedFunctionSample — one sample per waypoint ParametricPathPoint — path point per sample TrajectoryPoint — time offset per sample MathModelRun — execution record MathModelPerf — latency / throughput counters MathModelData — links model to trajectory + input vectors
Requires DJL 0.31.0 JARs on the classpath: ai.djl:api:0.31.0 ai.djl.onnxruntime:onnxruntime-engine:0.31.0 com.microsoft.onnxruntime:onnxruntime:1.18.0
The ONNX model file is resolved from MathModelDefContent.contentLocation (e.g. component://moqui-device/data/ml/trajectory_planner.onnx). Run script/train_trajectory_planner.py once to produce it.

parameter.name: mathModelId
parameter.description: ID of the MathModel instance to use for inference.

parameter.name: startConfig
parameter.description: 6 joint angles in radians — start configuration.

parameter.name: goalConfig
parameter.description: 6 joint angles in radians — goal configuration.
